summary: Iteration 10 retest PASSED for all 4 scenarios. Backend overlap fix verified: both POST /api/bookings and PUT /api/bookings/{id} now block against booking_pending/booking_paid (in addition to aktif). Frontend Dashboard.jsx confirmed to fetch all bookings then client-filter to ['aktif','booking_pending','booking_paid'] — room card turns brown + legend 'Booked (n)' increments on date filter when a public booking_pending exists.

test_results.test_internal_create_overlap_blocked_by_: PASS — POST /api/bookings overlapping booking_pending returns 400 'Kamar sudah dibooking'
test_results.test_internal_create_succeeds_after_publ: PASS — after DELETE /api/bookings/{pub_id}, internal POST same window succeeds (200)
test_results.test_update_booking_overlap_blocked_by_p: PASS — PUT /api/bookings/{aktif_id} to overlap booking_pending returns 400
test_results.test_public_booking_service_fee_smoke: PASS — service_fee=3% subtotal, total=subtotal+fee, dp_min=50% total
test_results.test_availability_smoke: PASS — /bookings/availability returns N slots with available+date+reason
test_results.test_availability_marks_public_booking: PASS — availability marks booking_pending date as available=false with kode in reason
test_results.UI_dashboard_date_filter_with_booking_pe: PASS — created TEST_DASH_UI_PEND via /api/public/bookings on room 1 for 2026-07-03; opened dashboard, set Booking pada=07/03/2026; room 1 turned BROWN with badge '03 Jul, 07:00 Booked' and guest name visible; legend 'Booked (1)' included the pending booking; reset to today restored realtime status. Screenshot saved at /root/.emergent/.../dash_filter_pending.png

action_items: Iteration 9 bugs are FIXED. Phase C (Xendit) and Phase D (WA/widgets) still pending — proceed with implementation when ready.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py create_booking & update_booking now correctly include 3 statuses in overlap query (lines 976, 1073). Consistent with public_create_booking (line 291) and booking_availability (line 1027). Good.

Dashboard.jsx (line 49-52): fetches /bookings without status filter then client-filters via .filter(x => ['aktif','booking_pending','booking_paid'].includes(x.status)). Works correctly. Minor: could be optimized to query backend with $in via repeated calls or new param to avoid pulling all rows (low volume so OK for now).

Backend list_bookings (/api/bookings GET) only supports single status param via $in not implemented. If booking volume grows beyond ~1000 rows, Dashboard pull-all approach should be replaced with server-side multi-status filter (e.g., status=aktif,booking_pending,booking_paid CSV). Document this for future scale.

Stale TEST_ bookings linger in DB with status 'selesai'/'dibatalkan'/'kadaluarsa' (cannot be deleted via DELETE /api/bookings — by design since status != 'aktif'). Recommend adding a admin-only bulk-cleanup endpoint or DB script for test environments. Minor.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration10_overlap.py (NEW: 6 regression tests for iter10 overlap fixes)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Dashboard date-filter with booking_pending verified visually + legend count)

test_credentials: owner / owner123 — public endpoints require no auth
seed_data_creation: Created during testing and cleaned up: TEST_ITER10_PUB1/PUB2/PUB3/AKT/INT/INT2/UPD_INT/UPD_PUB/FEE/AVAIL plus UI TEST_DASH_UI_PEND. All aktif/booking_pending bookings deleted via DELETE /api/bookings/{id}. Final inventory of TEST_ITER10_* and TEST_DASH_UI_* = 0.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 bugs are fully fixed. Backend (POST + PUT /bookings now block against booking_pending/booking_paid) and Frontend (Dashboard.jsx fetches all bookings then filters to 3 occupy-statuses) both verified. Next phases: Phase C (Xendit payment integration on /api/public/bookings — currently booking stays in booking_pending forever since no payment trigger; SuccessView still shows 'Pembayaran via Xendit akan dikirim ke WhatsApp' placeholder) and Phase D (WhatsApp + widgets) NOT yet implemented. Token in localStorage key 'ph_token'. Login redirects to '/' not '/dashboard'. Public booking always 6h day_use (hardcoded line 287). Test file /app/backend/tests/test_iteration10_overlap.py is reusable as regression for the overlap fix.
rca_of_the_issue: Bug (FIXED in iter 9 and verified in iter 10): Dashboard.jsx previously called GET /bookings?status=aktif → public/online bookings (booking_pending) and paid bookings (booking_paid) never appeared in the bookings state → bookingsOnDate filter could not mark them brown. Backend POST/PUT /bookings overlap query also only checked status=aktif → an internal booking could be created/edited on top of a public pending booking. Fix: (a) Dashboard fetches without filter and includes 3 statuses client-side; (b) Backend overlap $in includes ['aktif','booking_pending','booking_paid']. Both fixes verified end-to-end.
